channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NCML] Trading Window Closure Announced by Nilachal Carbo Metalicks Ltd
item.description:
Nilachal Carbo Metalicks Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all Designated Persons and their immediate relatives. The closure will be in effect from Wednesday, 01st April, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the quarter and year ended 31st March, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the financial results declaration has not been announced yet.

  • Trading window closure announced for Designated Persons and their immediate relatives
  • Closure effective from 01st April, 2026
  • Will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the quarter and year ended 31st March, 2026
  • Date of Board Meeting for financial results declaration to be announced separately

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nilachal Carbo Metalicks Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SUNCLAYLTD] TVS Holdings Ltd Acquires Additional Shares in Subsidiary Home Credit India Finance Private Ltd for Rs. 526.79 Cr.
item.description:
🔥 Trending

TVS Holdings Ltd has subscribed to and has been allotted an additional 229,139,017 equity shares of ₹10/- each in Home Credit India Finance Private Limited (HCIFPL), a subsidiary of the Company. The aggregate cost of this additional investment exceeds the materiality threshold and is being made in compliance with Clause A(1)(ii)(c) of Part A of Schedule III of the SEBI LODR Regulations. The acquisition is being conducted at arms’ length and the allotment of 22,91,39,017 equity shares of HCIFPL has been completed on 28th March 2026. The Company has acquired an additional 22,91,39,017 equity shares of HCIFPL, increasing its shareholding to 80.39%.

  • TVS Holdings Ltd acquires additional shares in subsidiary Home Credit India Finance Private Ltd for Rs. 526.79 Cr.
  • The acquisition is a related party transaction as HCIFPL is a subsidiary company.
  • The transaction is being conducted at arms’ length based on a valuation report obtained from a Registered Valuer.
  • The allotment of 22,91,39,017 equity shares of HCIFPL has been completed on 28th March 2026.
  • Post the additional acquisition, the shareholding of the Company in HCIFPL has become 80.39%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUNDARAM-CLAYTON LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SDBL] Som Distilleries' License Suspension Persists; Company Seeks Validation
item.description:
Som Distilleries & Breweries Ltd. has provided an update on the suspension of its license. The company initially reported the suspension in a press release dated 5th February 2026, and the situation remains unchanged. Despite the Single Bench of the Madhya Pradesh High Court not favoring their petition for license validation on 23rd March 2026, the company has approached the Double Bench of the same court. A relief has been granted, permitting their associate company to participate in the country liquor tender process. The final order is awaited. The company is committed to keeping shareholders and stakeholders informed of any material developments.

  • Som Distilleries' license suspension remains unchanged since the initial report on 5th February 2026.
  • The Single Bench of the Madhya Pradesh High Court did not favor the company's petition for license validation on 23rd March 2026.
  • The company has approached the Double Bench of the Madhya Pradesh High Court for relief.
  • An associate company of Som Distilleries has been permitted to participate in the country liquor tender process.
  • The final order in the matter is currently awaited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SOM DISTILLERIES & BREWERIES LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [AVG] AVG Logistics Schedules Board Meeting to Consider Funds Raising Proposal
item.description:
AVG Logistics Ltd has informed the BSE that a meeting of the Board of Directors is scheduled on 06/04/2026. The meeting will inter alia consider and approve the proposal for raising funds by way of issue of one or more instruments including Equity Shares, Convertible Warrants or other Securities, through Right issue, Preferential Issue, Private Placements, or any other methods or combination thereof as may be permitted under applicable laws. The funds raised are subject to regulatory/statutory approvals as may be required and deemed appropriate by the Company.

  • AVG Logistics Ltd scheduled a Board Meeting on 06/04/2026
  • The meeting aims to consider and approve the proposal for raising funds
  • The funds may be raised through Right issue, Preferential Issue, Private Placements, or any other methods
  • The funds raising is subject to regulatory/statutory approvals
  • The information was uploaded on the Company’s website at www.avglogistics.com

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AVG Logistics Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [SHINDL] Sharat Industries Ltd: Promoter Sharat Reddy Sabbella Acquires Additional 1.31 Lakh Equity Shares via Pledge
item.description:
Sharat Industries Ltd, in accordance with Regulation 7(2) of SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015, disclosed the purchase of equity shares by promoter Sharat Reddy Sabbella. The acquisition was made through a pledge of 1.31 lakh equity shares, increasing his shareholding from 22.77% to 23.1%. The transaction was executed on the BSE Limited on 27th March, 2026.

  • Sharat Reddy Sabbella, promoter of Sharat Industries Ltd, acquired an additional 1.31 lakh equity shares.
  • The acquisition was made through a pledge of shares, increasing his shareholding from 22.77% to 23.1%.
  • The transaction was executed on the BSE Limited on 27th March, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHARAT INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [PETPLST] Pet Plastics Ltd Announces Resignation of Executive Managing Director Ritesh Vijay Vakil
item.description:
Pet Plastics Ltd has announced the resignation of its Executive Managing Director, Ritesh Vijay Vakil, with effect from close of business hours on March 28, 2026. The resignation is due to a change in control of the company. The disclosure required under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations and SEBI Master Circular no. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated March 28, 2026, in respect of the resignation of Executive Directors, are set out in Annexure 1. The resignation letter is attached to the disclosure.

  • Pet Plastics Ltd announces resignation of Executive Managing Director Ritesh Vijay Vakil
  • Resignation effective from close of business hours on March 28, 2026
  • Resignation due to change in control of the company
  • Regulation 30 disclosures and resignation letter attached

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PET PLASTICS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PETPLST] Pet Plastics Ltd: Managing Director, Ritesh Vijay Vakil, Resigns Effective March 28, 2026
item.description:
Pet Plastics Ltd announced the resignation of its Executive Managing Director, Ritesh Vijay Vakil, with effect from the close of business hours on March 28, 2026. The resignation is due to a change in control of the company. The company disclosed the required information under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations and SEBI Master Circular no. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated November 11, 2024, in respect of the resignation of Executive Directors.

  • Ritesh Vijay Vakil has resigned as Executive Managing Director of Pet Plastics Ltd.
  • The resignation will take effect from the close of business hours on March 28, 2026.
  • The reason for resignation is a change in control of the company.
  • The company has made the necessary disclosures under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations.
  • The resignation letter has been attached to the disclosure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PET PLASTICS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [UTKARSHBNK] Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Ltd. Announces Outcome of NCLT Meeting on Scheme of Amalgamation
item.description:
Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Ltd. has announced the outcome of the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) convened meeting of the Unsecured Creditors held on March 28, 2026. The meeting was held in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 and Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The meeting was attended by 16 Unsecured Creditors and was chaired by Dr. Santosh Kumari, Chairperson of the Meeting appointed by the Hon’ble NCLT. The Bank has not received any request from the Unsecured Creditors during the specified period to speak at the Meeting.

  • Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Ltd. held a NCLT convened meeting of the Unsecured Creditors on March 28, 2026 to discuss the Scheme of Amalgamation between Utkarsh CoreInvest Limited and Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Limited.
  • The meeting was held in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 and Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
  • The meeting was attended by 16 Unsecured Creditors and was chaired by Dr. Santosh Kumari, Chairperson of the Meeting appointed by the Hon’ble NCLT.
  • The Bank has not received any request from the Unsecured Creditors during the specified period to speak at the Meeting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Ltd | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [RELICTEC] Relic Technologies Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window
item.description:
Relic Technologies Limited has announced the closure of the trading window for buying/selling/dealing/trading in the shares of the company. The closure is pursuant to the Insider Trading Policy & SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading Code), Regulations, 2015. The trading window will be closed from April 01, 2026, and it will be reopened after 48 hours of the conclusion of the Board Meeting where the Audited Financial Results for the year ended March 31, 2026, will be approved. The date of the Board Meeting is yet to be intimated. The notification has been sent to the Directors, Promoters, Auditors, all the Designated Employees and their Immediate Relatives.

  • Relic Technologies Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window
  • The closure is pursuant to the Insider Trading Policy & SEBI regulations
  • The trading window will be closed from April 01, 2026
  • It will be reopened after 48 hours of the Board Meeting
  • The date of the Board Meeting is yet to be intimated

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RELIC TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PETPLST] Pet Plastics Ltd Executive Managing Director, Mr. Ritesh Vijay Vakil, Resigns Effective March 28, 2026
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Pet Plastics Ltd announced that Executive Managing Director, Mr. Ritesh Vijay Vakil, has tendered his resignation from the Board, effective March 28, 2026. The resignation is due to a change in control of the Company. Mr. Vakil has served the company as Executive Director and Managing Director and has expressed his gratitude for the support and guidance he received during his tenure.

  • Mr. Ritesh Vijay Vakil has resigned from his position as Executive Managing Director of Pet Plastics Ltd.
  • The resignation will take effect from close of business hours on March 28, 2026.
  • The reason for resignation is a change in control of the Company.
  • Mr. Vakil has served the company as Executive Director and Managing Director.
  • He has expressed his gratitude for the support and guidance he received during his tenure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PET PLASTICS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
